description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2.1, §8.1 full target.

Work:
- build_fn_signature: remove the `if !is_native` branch; all fns get Tail CC + typed params + cont last.
- compile_fn: entry block binds typed SSA params directly (no frame-slot loads, no frame_ptr).
- Remove emit_return-into-cont-frame path (replaced by .1.b).
- compile_uniform_path / parking_frame seeding adjusted to construct an initial cont closure for the entry call instead of seeding slot-0.

Acceptance:
- §8.1 full target for tail_recursion.fz: `function %count(i64,i64,i64) tail` with zero frame slot loads.
- No SystemV-CC fz fns remain in clif dump.
- Full suite still green (uniform-path scaffolding remains in runtime for now; deletion is fz-siu.5).
title: fz-cps.1.e: delete uniform branch — all fns native-tier
